purpose: AppSheet + Google Sheets + Apps Script onboarding workflow with document-generation queue, file-request tracking, generated-document email sending, signed-document upload, and people/MF enrichment.

Doc_Templates.role: Active template catalog used to create Generation_Job_Items and Agreements_Files

Agreements_Files.role: File request/output rows for generated documents and email attachments

Generation_Jobs.role: Generation queue head; one job per onboarding and doc category

Generation_Job_Items.role: Per-template work item created by job, converted to Agreements_Files row

People_List.role: Normalized people for Contact/Manager/BeneficialOwner linked to onboarding

Static_Attachments.role: Static email attachments selected by Is_Active and Category

apps_script_files.00_Config.gs: CONFIG, schemas, aliases, API/table names, feature flags, secrets config references
apps_script_files.02_Headers_Mapping.gs: header enforcement, text formats, mapping, source marker column
apps_script_files.03_Import.gs: source import and destination dedupe index
apps_script_files.04_Process.gs: destination row processing, MF/AppSheet pushes, People_List refs
apps_script_files.08_ID_And_Dedupe_Time.gs: IDs, dedupe keys, timestamps, utility writes

Send for approval.condition: AND(IN(CONTEXT("View"), LIST("New leads", "New or Sending for approval_Detail")), [Status] = "New")

Job - start if next.condition_summary: Job_Status is Queued, job is oldest queued by Queued_At, and no job has status Creating items or Generating files.

core_bots.JOB - start queued job: On Generation_Jobs data change, run action Job - start if next on LIST([Job_ID]).
core_bots.JOB - create job items: On Generation_Jobs update when Job_Status = Creating items and there are no items for Job_ID, a minimal webhook adds Generation_Job_Items rows from active Doc_Templates where Category = Job_Type. The webhook sends only Template_ID and Item_Status; other fields are initial values or app formulas.
core_bots.JOBITEM - create Agreements_Files rows: On Generation_Job_Items add with Item_Status = Queued, run JOBITEM - create file request and mark done on LIST([Job_Item_ID]).
core_bots.JOB - finish and continue queue: On Generation_Job_Items update when all items for the job are File request created, mark Generation_Jobs file requests created and start next queued job.
core_bots.Generate Agreements: Legacy native AppSheet PDF generator on Agreements_Files; disable for Agreement documents when using Apps Script generator.
core_bots.Generate Agreements - Apps Script: On Generation_Job_Items update when all sibling items for Job_ID are File request created, call generateAgreementFilesFromAppSheet(onboardingId, jobId, agreementFileId). This only enqueues the Job_ID in standalone Apps Script BIBIV_Onboarding_DocsCreator. A 1-minute time-trigger worker processNextQueuedDocGenerationJob processes one queued job at a time, exports Google Docs templates to PDF via Drive/Docs, marks Agreements_Files Ready, marks Generation_Job_Items Agreement file created, creates missing Signed_Documents upload placeholders for generated agreement docs, and updates main Status to Agreements Generated when all agreement files are ready.
core_bots.Generate Applications: Analogous to Generate Agreements for Category = Application; details partially uncaptured.
core_bots.Send agreements: When agreements generated, change status to Sending documents, email ready Agreement files plus active static Agreement attachments, then change status to Waiting for client signature.

queue_invariants: At most one active generation job at a time. Active statuses: Creating items, Generating files.
Only oldest Queued job by Queued_At may start.
Job item creation is guarded by COUNT(items for Job_ID)=0.
Completion of a job's file-request phase requires all items Item_Status = File request created.

file_naming_current.path_rule: Folder_Path remains a constant root such as Files_Application_ or Files_Agreements_; formulas must add an explicit slash before NIP_Control, producing Files_Agreements_/NIP/file.pdf rather than Files_Agreements_NIP/file.pdf.

current_working_notes: Agreement document generation and sending has been verified working after moving heavy file/path expressions out of the JOB - create job items webhook.

Agreement PDF generation has moved from native AppSheet Create a new file tasks to standalone Apps Script BIBIV_Onboarding_DocsCreator in apps-script-docs-creator/. AppSheet calls generateAgreementFilesFromAppSheet to enqueue a job; processNextQueuedDocGenerationJob runs from a 1-minute trigger and generates one queued Job_ID at a time so Google Docs headers, footers, margins, and page numbers survive PDF export.

Standalone agreement generator now creates missing Signed_Documents rows for successfully generated Agreement files only, deduped by Onboarding_ID + Template_ID_Reference + Category. Static_Attachments are intentionally excluded.

Agreement generator now supports intermediate Agreements_Files.File_status values Generating and Generated before final Ready. Ready remains the only status that should trigger completion/email bots. Add Generating/Generated to the AppSheet enum before relying on the visible progress states.

Main sync maps email, name, PESEL, and phone for the sales representative from SOURCE to DEST/AppSheet for new imports. Historical blank-field backfill is complete and CONFIG.BACKFILL_EXISTING_ENABLED is currently OFF.

Historical company-name correction is isolated in runRefreshNameApiOnly() and controlled by CONFIG.NAME_API_REFRESH_ENABLED. It overwrites only BIBIV_onboarding_APP/DEST name_api from REGON/GOV and does not run import, AppSheet, People, Bank_Accounts, or status logic. CONFIG.NAME_API_REFRESH_FROM_LIST=true restricts the run to CONFIG.NAME_API_REFRESH_TARGET_NIPS; false runs all rows within the configured scan/row limits.

Regular GOV/MF enrichment is gated by CONFIG.GOV_ENRICH_ONLY_STATUS_INIT=true. New imports receive Status=Init, and existing rows with blank or workflow statuses must not re-run GOV/MF or overwrite name_api.
name_api must come from REGON/GOV, not from VAT subject.name. Regular REGON, VAT, and IBAN enrichment uses GOV API only; direct MF and relay fallback paths have been removed from the Apps Script.
Persistent REGON hard failures marked with MF_REGON_BLOCK are moved to Status = need verification so the row waits for manual review instead of being retried forever.
Generation_Job_Items uses Initial value for Job_Item_ID, Job_ID, Item_Status/Created_At and App formula for Onboarding_ID, NIP_Control, template-derived fields, File_Name, and File.
The old full webhook body with inline File/File_Name CONCATENATE expressions should be treated as superseded because it can trigger AppSheet quote parsing errors.
verify_before_editing: Full Trigger: Signed Docs Ready condition and target status value.
Generate Applications bot branches and task settings.
Whether legacy actions Prepare applications/agreements and Add templates files are still referenced.
